data.body: ORDERING CORRECTION: 21ca's union literal-key sweep (single inbound_fields.py exemption) is the FINAL neutrality gate — it also flags outbound_differ.py + outbound_links.py, which 625b/eefd own. 21ca plan states keys are 'the last vendor reach-through AFTER the sibling stories land'. So stack order is 97f2->aff0->625b->eefd->21ca (21ca LAST). Plan: claim 21ca now to lock attestation, but implement it last on top of 625b/eefd so the sweep passes. 21ca oracle already authored (sweep in heldout file, will relocate into test_backend_neutrality.py at impl time). Proceeding: 625b next.
